name: Tomato Bisque
recipeIngredient: 1 300 g package of soft tofu, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the tofu and canned tomatoes in a blender or food processor until smooth.
2. In a saucepan, sauté onion and garlic in oil until the onion begins to brown. Add salt. Remove from heat.
3. Dissolve cornstarch in 1 cup cold water and pour into the sauteed onion and garlic mixture. Stir constantly to avoid lumps. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat and let simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Add the tofu mixture, chopped fresh tomato, celery, and the remaining water. Heat on medium for 10 minutes. Serve immediately.
